# zstack_sns_http_endpoint (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SNS HTTP endpoints in ZStack. An SNS HTTP endpoint receives notifications by HTTP callback.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SNS HTTP endpoint.
- `url` (String) The callback URL of the SNS HTTP endpoint.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the SNS HTTP endpoint.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the SNS HTTP endpoint. This is a write-only sensitive field.
- `platform_uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNS platform.
- `username` (String) The username for the SNS HTTP endpoint.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The current state of the SNS HTTP endpoint.
- `type` (String) The endpoint type.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNS HTTP endpoint.
